summary: Frontend-only validation completed for Instagram-style chatbot UI. Core functional flows pass on desktop and mobile.

issues: Bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps footer note text area, reducing readability of the viewer note.

action_items: Adjust mobile footer/safe-area spacing so floating badge does not overlap viewer note content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Desktop flows passed: app load, JSON parsing, sidebar conversation rendering, conversation switch updates chat pane, Aditya/right and others/left message alignment verified. Mobile sidebar toggle/open/select/close flow passed using overlay-scoped selectors.
rca of the issue: Overlay is caused by fixed floating environment badge occupying bottom-right space on mobile viewport; chat footer note container does not reserve sufficient safe area against this external overlay.
